action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 7 ran 13 epochs CLIP-L/14 with region-balancing, val worst=0.5915, very similar to iter5 (0.5816 with 8 epochs no balance). Best ckpt is epoch 13 worst=0.5915. Time used ~3459s, budget 8.27h left. Iter 6 eval test=0.4566 corresponded to val worst=0.5816. Now val=0.5915 — slight improvement. Analysis: Need to submit eval to see if improvement transfers to test. Then consider WiSE-FT (interpolating with zero-shot/initial weights) which is known to help worst-case OOD a lot. Decision: Submit eval first to measure current model, then plan WiSE-FT or further training.
